intention: 公司/团队引入并开始使用一个新工具或新技术
avoidSaying: use a new tool for the first time / start to use
sentencePatterns: Many teams have adopted ... to improve ...
Once we adopt ..., the workflow will ...
realLifeExamples: I took the initiative to learn AI when the company adopted GitHub Copilot.
Many teams have adopted Agile to improve delivery speed.
productionPrompts: 用 When the company adopted ... 造一句关于工具或流程变化的句子。
